specialRules.Leader: Any warrior within 6" may use this model's Leadership when taking Leadership tests.
specialRules.Perfect Killer: Always has an extra -1 modifier to any armour save the enemy has to take against wounds inflicted (both shooting and close combat).
specialRules.Wizard: This model is a spell caster and may use spells from their assigned spell list.
specialRules.Warrior Wizard: This model is both a fighter and a spell caster, combining martial and magical prowess.
specialRules.Prayers of Sigmar: This model may use Prayers of Sigmar. Prayers work like spells but can be used while wearing armour.
specialRules.Prayers: This model may use prayers from their assigned prayer list. Prayers work like spells but can be used while wearing armour.
specialRules.Apprentice: This model is a wizard's apprentice. If the master wizard is taken out of action, the apprentice may not cast spells for the rest of the battle.
specialRules.Cause Fear: This model causes Fear. Enemy models must pass a Leadership test to charge this model.
specialRules.Fear: This model causes Fear. Enemy models must pass a Leadership test to charge this model.
specialRules.Frenzy: This model gains +1 Attack when charging. Must always charge if able. Cannot flee or voluntarily leave combat.
specialRules.Undead: This model is Undead. It never needs to take Rout tests, is immune to Fear, and is immune to poison.
specialRules.Immune to Psychology: This model is immune to Fear, Terror, and all other psychology effects.
specialRules.Immune to Poison: Poisons have no effect on this model.
specialRules.Stupidity: Must pass a Leadership test at the start of each turn or do nothing (move D6" in a random direction).
specialRules.Regeneration: Roll a D6 after being wounded. On a 4+, the wound is regenerated. Fire and flaming attacks negate this ability.
specialRules.Large Target: This model is a Large Target. It can be seen over obstacles and other models and can always be shot at.
specialRules.Hatred: May re-roll missed attacks in the first round of close combat.
specialRules.Stubborn: This model may re-roll failed Leadership tests.
specialRules.Animosity: At the start of each turn, roll D6. On a 1, the model squabbles with nearby allies instead of acting normally.
specialRules.No Pain: Treats Stunned results as Knocked Down.
specialRules.Eternal: If this model is taken out of action, roll D6. On 1-3, the model returns next game with no ill effects.
specialRules.Kindred Hatred: Has Hatred of Dark Elves (or High Elves). May re-roll missed attacks in the first round of combat against them.
specialRules.Excellent Sight: +1 to spot Hidden enemies. Can detect enemies at up to double the normal range.
specialRules.Hate Dark Elves: Has Hatred of Dark Elves. May re-roll missed attacks in the first round of combat against them.
specialRules.Hate Chaos: Has Hatred of all Chaos warbands. May re-roll missed attacks in the first round of combat.
specialRules.Hate Orcs and Goblins: Has Hatred of all Orc and Goblin models. May re-roll missed attacks in the first round of combat.
specialRules.Scaly Skin: This model has a natural armour save due to scaly skin.
specialRules.Scaly Skin 4+: This model has a 4+ natural armour save due to thick scaly skin.
specialRules.Scaly Skin 5+: This model has a 5+ natural armour save due to scaly skin.
specialRules.Cold Blooded: When taking Leadership tests, roll 3D6 and discard the highest result.
specialRules.Aquatic: This model suffers no movement penalty for moving through water terrain.
specialRules.Jungle born: This model suffers no movement penalty for moving through jungle or forest terrain.
specialRules.Natural Stealth: This model can hide even after running. Enemies must halve detection range.
specialRules.Infiltrator: Deployed after opponent, anywhere on the table out of sight and more than 12" from any enemy model.
specialRules.Stealthy: May deploy twice the normal distance onto the battlefield and may start the battle Hidden.
specialRules.Animal: This model is an animal and does not gain experience.
specialRules.Animals: This model is an animal and does not gain experience.
specialRules.Daemonic: Has a 5+ ward save against all non-magical attacks. Immune to poison. Immune to psychology.
specialRules.Mutations: This model may purchase mutations from the mutations list.
specialRules.Swarm: This model represents a swarm of creatures. Cannot be knocked down or stunned. Takes wounds normally.
specialRules.Slow: This model moves at half rate (may not run).
specialRules.Poisonous: This model's attacks are poisonous. A wound roll of 6 causes an automatic critical hit.
specialRules.Flammable: If hit by a fire-based attack, this model suffers double damage.
specialRules.Cloud of Flies: Enemies in base contact suffer -1 to hit this model in close combat.
specialRules.Stream of Corruption: Instead of attacking normally, may breathe a noxious stream. Use the flame template; all models touched take S3 hits.
specialRules.Nurgle's Blessings: This model is blessed by Nurgle. It has a 5+ ward save against non-magical wounds.
specialRules.Unstable: If this model loses combat, it takes additional wounds equal to the difference in combat resolution.
specialRules.Bloodgreed: If this model takes an enemy out of action in close combat, it must feed and cannot do anything else next turn.
specialRules.Spells of the Undead: This model may use Necromancy spells.
specialRules.Burn the Witch!: This model has Hatred of all spell casters.
specialRules.Knights Virtue: This knight is superior to ordinary warriors and never needs to take All Alone tests.
specialRules.Wight Blades: This model's attacks have a -1 armour save modifier. Wounds caused count as critical on a 5+.
specialRules.Guardian: This model is a guardian and must always be within 6" of the warband leader.
specialRules.Pit Fighter: +1 Attack and +1 WS when fighting two or more opponents.
specialRules.Quick Reload: This model may fire blackpowder weapons every turn without the usual reload penalty.
specialRules.Weapon Knowledge: May use any weapon regardless of race restrictions.
specialRules.Expert Swordsmen: Re-roll missed attacks when using a sword.
specialRules.Expert Weaponsmith: May modify one weapon to be of superior quality, granting +1 to hit.
specialRules.Hunter: This model is an experienced hunter. +1 to hit with ranged weapons against targets in the open.
specialRules.Swordmaster: Re-roll missed attacks when using a sword. May parry even two-handed attacks.
specialRules.Melee Specialists: Re-roll one failed to-hit roll per combat phase.
specialRules.Ride: This model is mounted and follows the rules for mounted warriors.
specialRules.Combat Riding: The mount may make an additional attack at S3 during close combat.
specialRules.Horse Handling: This model is an expert rider. No penalties for shooting while mounted.
specialRules.Trailblazers: This model and any friendly models within 6" ignore movement penalties for difficult terrain.
specialRules.Trained: This animal has been trained and follows the handler's commands.
specialRules.Requires Beastmaster: This model requires a Beastmaster in the warband. If the Beastmaster is taken out of action, this model moves randomly.
specialRules.Cold One Beasthound Handler: This model can control Cold One Beasthounds. Without the handler, the beasts move randomly.
specialRules.Bear Handler: This model can control War Bears. Without the handler, bears move and attack randomly.
specialRules.Bear Hug: If both attacks hit in close combat, the bear grabs the target. The target is automatically hit in subsequent rounds until freed.
specialRules.Pack Leader: Warhounds within 6" may use this model's Leadership for Leadership tests.
specialRules.Bestial: This model is a beast. It cannot open doors, pick up items, or use equipment.
specialRules.Dumb Monster: This model is a mindless brute. It cannot gain experience and follows simple commands.
specialRules.Crazed: Subject to Frenzy. If knocked down, must test Leadership or go berserk, attacking the nearest model (friend or foe).
specialRules.Crazy: Subject to Frenzy. Attacks the nearest model (friend or foe) if not controlled.
specialRules.May Not Run: This model may never run. It always moves at normal speed.
specialRules.Slow Witted: This model is slow to react. Always strikes last in close combat regardless of Initiative.
specialRules.Bite Attack: This model makes an additional attack at S3 using its bite.
specialRules.Trample: When charging, this model inflicts D3 S4 hits on the target before normal combat.
specialRules.Vomit Attack: Instead of normal attacks, this model may vomit on one enemy in base contact. The target takes a S3 hit with no armour save.
specialRules.Charge: This model gains +1 Strength when charging.
specialRules.Death Wish: This model never needs to take All Alone tests and is immune to Fear.
specialRules.Deathwish: This model never needs to take All Alone tests and is immune to Fear.
specialRules.Fanatical: This model is utterly fearless. Immune to Fear and All Alone tests.
specialRules.Fiercely Loyal: This model will never leave the warband voluntarily.
specialRules.Sneaky: This model may deploy after all other models and may be placed in hiding.
specialRules.Life of Slavery: This model has suffered under harsh masters. It has a permanent -1 Leadership.
specialRules.Hard to Kill: Rolls of 1-3 on the injury table count as Knocked Down instead of Out of Action.
specialRules.Hard Head: 4+ save to avoid being stunned (counts as knocked down instead).
specialRules.Hardened: This model has seen much combat. Immune to Fear.
specialRules.Promotion: If the warband leader is killed, this model may be promoted to leader.
specialRules.Always Hungry: At the start of each battle, roll D6. On a 1, the model eats a random henchman from the warband.
specialRules.Looting the Dead: After a battle, this model finds D6 gc worth of loot on fallen enemies.
specialRules.Desert Trader: Reduce the rarity of trade goods by 1 when this model searches the trading post.
specialRules.Scorpion Sting (Black Lotus): This model's attacks are coated with Black Lotus poison. Wounds cause an additional -1 save modifier.
specialRules.Cloak and Dagger: This model may deploy hidden anywhere on the board more than 8" from the enemy.
specialRules.Convincing Manner: This model can attempt to bribe enemy henchmen. Roll Leadership test to make an enemy henchman miss a turn.
specialRules.Slick Operator: +1 to all trade and exploration rolls.
specialRules.Incomparable Miners: Dwarfs are expert miners. +1 to finding wyrdstone in the exploration phase.
specialRules.Inscribe Runes: This model may inscribe a rune onto one weapon per battle, giving it +1 to hit or +1 Strength for that battle.
specialRules.Armour: This model wears armour as described in its profile.
specialRules.Not Orcs: This model is not an Orc and does not benefit from Orc-specific rules.
specialRules.Runts: This model is particularly small. -1 to be hit by missile weapons.
specialRules.Sluggas: These models prefer close combat. +1 to charge range.
specialRules.Minderz: This model keeps the other Orcs in line. Nearby Orcs may re-roll failed Animosity tests.
specialRules.Oi Behave!: Friendly Orc models within 6" may re-roll failed Animosity tests.
specialRules.Gun-Rest: This model may use another model as a gun rest, gaining +1 to hit with handguns.
specialRules.Expert Riggers: This model is skilled at operating war machines. +1 to hit with war machines.
specialRules.Blessed Sight: This model has been blessed with supernatural sight. Can detect Hidden enemies within 12".
specialRules.Black Orc: Immune to Animosity. May re-roll failed Leadership tests.
specialRules.Set Traps: This model may set traps during deployment. Place a marker; enemies moving within 2" trigger it on 3+ for a S4 hit.
specialRules.Inspired Cooking: Before battle, one friendly model may re-roll a single failed roll. One use per battle.
specialRules.Woodland Dwelling: This model suffers no movement penalties in wooded terrain and may hide in any wooded area.
specialRules.Ride Spiders: This model rides a Giant Spider. M7, may climb vertical surfaces without penalty.
specialRules.Plague Cart: This model pushes a plague cart. All friendly Nurgle models within 6" gain +1 to Fear tests caused.
specialRules.Animated Construct: This model is an animated construct. It never needs to take Rout tests, is immune to Fear, and cannot gain experience.
specialRules.Unnatural Strength: This model has unnatural strength. +1 Strength.
specialRules.Drunken: Automatically passes all Leadership tests. -1 Initiative.
specialRules.One with the Jungle: This model can move through jungle terrain without penalty.
specialRules.Concealment: When hiding in jungle terrain, enemies must halve their detection range.
specialRules.Inheritance: If this model is taken out of action, their equipment is passed on to a chosen warband member.
specialRules.Extra Set of Hands: This model has an extra set of arms. +1 Attack.
specialRules.Evade: This model may attempt to dodge ranged attacks. 5+ ward save against missile fire.
specialRules.Hang the Bandit!: This model has Hatred of all Bandits and Outlaws.
specialRules.Lowest of the Low: This model is expendable. The warband does not need to take Rout tests for this model being taken out of action.
specialRules.Movement 2D6: This model moves 2D6" instead of its normal movement value.
specialRules.Large: This model is a Large Target. It can be seen over obstacles and other models and can always be shot at.
specialRules.Undead Construct: Ignores any injury rolled on the Injury chart on a 4+ and continues fighting. This is not an armour save and is not modified by the Strength of the attack. This rule is ignored for wounds caused by magic or magic weapons.
specialRules.Assembly: Bone Goliaths are constructed at great expense. Constructing one reduces the Liche's starting Wound total by D3 (minimum 1), in addition to the gold cost. The warband may not look for rare items that post-battle. A warband with no Liche may not construct a Bone Goliath. Warbands starting with one can ignore this rule.
